sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CRH plc Advances Share Buyback Program with Recent Share Acquisition
feed.summary: CRH plc announced it has acquired and canceled 31,300 of its ordinary shares at an average price of $126.1370 as part of an ongoing share buyback program. This initiative, aiming to repurchase up to $300 million worth of shares by February 2026, is designed to optimize the capital structure and enhance shareholder value. CRH plc is a global leader in building materials, supplying diverse construction products worldwide.

feed.title: Is QuidelOrtho A Bargain After Recent 39.1% Price Surge?
feed.summary: QuidelOrtho has seen a significant price surge recently but remains down year-to-date, prompting questions about its valuation. Despite the volatile share price history, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, scoring a 5/6 on their valuation checks. Both Discounted Cash Flow and Price to Sales analyses indicate QuidelOrtho is trading below its intrinsic value and fair ratio, respectively.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Faheem Hasnain Sells 10,000 Shares of Kura Oncology Inc (KURA)
feed.summary: Faheem Hasnain, a Director at Kura Oncology Inc (KURA), sold 10,000 shares on December 9, 2025, reducing his holdings to 23,983 shares. This transaction is part of a trend where Hasnain has sold 32,682 shares over the past year with no purchases, contributing to a total of 2 insider buys and 21 insider sells within Kura Oncology during the same period. The stock was trading at $10.98 per share at the time of the sale, resulting in a market cap of $934.570 million for the company.

feed.title: PTC Therapeutics Announces Health Canada Approval of Sephience™ (sepiapterin) for the Treatment of Children and Adults Living with Phenylketonuria (PKU)
feed.summary: PTC Therapeutics Canada ULC has received Health Canada approval for Sephience™ (sepiapterin), a new treatment for children and adults living with phenylketonuria (PKU). The approval covers a broad range of PKU subtypes for patients aged 1 month and older, addressing a significant unmet medical need. Sephience is now commercially available in Canada and has also been approved in the U.S. and European Economic Area.

feed.title: Onfolio’s $2.45M Crypto Bet Signals Bold Push Into Treasury Diversification
feed.summary: Onfolio Holdings Inc. has invested $2.45 million into a basket of cryptocurrencies, including Ethereum, Solana, and Bitcoin, as a new treasury management strategy. The company aims to generate yield through staking, gain exposure to digital asset price appreciation, and support growth initiatives like debt reduction and acquisitions. This move reflects a broader trend of firms utilizing digital assets to optimize treasury performance and diversify income streams.

feed.title: Solis Announces Drilling to Commence at Cinto Copper Project
feed.summary: Solis Minerals Limited received drilling permits for its Cinto Copper Project in southern Peru, located near significant copper mines. The diamond drilling campaign, budgeted for approximately 2,500 meters, will target coincident geochemical and geophysical anomalies identified through previous surveys. Mobilization of the drill rig and pad preparation will begin in December 2025, with drilling expected to commence shortly thereafter.

feed.title: Northrim BanCorp (NASDAQ:NRIM) Director Purchases $28,600.50 in Stock
feed.summary: Northrim BanCorp Director David McCambridge bought 1,150 shares of the company's stock for $28,600.50, increasing his total holdings to 41,598 shares. This purchase follows strong quarterly earnings and a dividend announcement, with analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating and a $33 price target for the stock.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Linda Thomas Acquires Shares of Northrim BanCorp Inc (NRIM)
feed.summary: Linda Thomas, a Director at Northrim BanCorp Inc, purchased 800 shares of the company on December 10, 2025, increasing her total holdings to 5,488 shares. This transaction is part of a broader trend of insider buying at Northrim BanCorp, indicating confidence despite the stock being considered "Significantly Overvalued" according to its GF Value. The company's P/E ratio of 9.39 is lower than the industry median, but its price-to-GF-Value ratio is 1.49.

feed.title: Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) Announces Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) has announced a quarterly dividend of 69 cents per outstanding share, payable on February 2, 2026, to shareholders of record by January 12, 2026. This announcement follows recent news of significant layoffs impacting over 13,000 employees as part of efforts to reduce outsourced expenses. Despite increased competition and only a marginal stock increase year-to-date, analysts project a 10.34% upside for the stock.

feed.title: Federal Signal Corporation $FSS Shares Purchased by Aperture Investors LLC
feed.summary: Aperture Investors LLC increased its stake in Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE:FSS) by 73.0% in Q2, acquiring 88,768 additional shares and making FSS its 12th largest holding. This comes as Federal Signal beat quarterly earnings estimates, and while multiple institutional investors modified their holdings, COO Mark Weber significantly reduced his stake. The company carries an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a $123 price target and recently declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Mirum (MIRM) PT to $95 on Strategic Bluejay Acquisition, Brelovitug Pipeline Addition
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Michael Ulz increased Mirum Pharmaceuticals' price target to $95 from $81, maintaining an Overweight rating, following the company's acquisition of Bluejay. This strategic acquisition adds brelovitug, a promising drug for hepatitis delta virus, to Mirum's pipeline, expanding its rare liver disease portfolio and creating valuable synergies. The company demonstrated strong financial performance in Q3 2025 with $133 million in revenue and positive net income, primarily driven by LIVMARLI and Bile Acid Medicines sales.

feed.title: Regency Centers executive chairman sells $1.05 million in stock
feed.summary: Martin E. Stein Jr., Executive Chairman of Regency Centers Corp (NASDAQ:REG), sold 15,000 shares of common stock for $1.05 million. This transaction comes as Regency Centers reports strong third-quarter 2025 financial results, exceeding both earnings and revenue expectations. The company maintains a "GOOD" financial health score and offers a 4.24% dividend yield with 32 consecutive years of dividend payments.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH Shares Sold by OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC
feed.summary: OCONNOR, a unit of UBS Asset Management Americas LLC, reduced its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) by 38% in the second quarter, selling 2,460 shares, leaving it with 4,020 shares valued at approximately $2.808 million. This comes as Parker-Hannifin exceeded quarterly earnings estimates, provided strong FY2026 guidance, and received multiple analyst price target increases, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating. Despite recent insider share sales by two vice presidents, institutional investors collectively own 82.44% of the stock.

feed.title: OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC Buys Shares of 23,320 Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. $ODFL
feed.summary: OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC has significantly invested in Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc., purchasing 23,320 shares valued at approximately $3.79 million. This acquisition, along with increased stakes from other institutional investors, highlights strong institutional interest in the company. Although Old Dominion Freight Line exceeded EPS estimates, its revenue saw a slight decline, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold" with a consensus target price of $157.48.

feed.title: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral Rating on OXY, Lowers Price Target | OXY Stock News
feed.summary: B of A Securities has maintained a "Neutral" rating on Occidental Petroleum (OXY) but reduced its price target from $45.00 to $44.00, reflecting challenges in the energy sector. This adjustment is part of a series of cautious stances from analysts, with the average target price for OXY now at $49.68 from 24 analysts, implying an 18.98% upside from its current price. However, GuruFocus estimates suggest a potential 6.99% downside from its fair value estimate of $38.83.

feed.title: Nebula Research & Development LLC Acquires New Stake in FedEx Corporation $FDX
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC recently acquired a new stake in FedEx Corporation, purchasing 21,311 shares valued at approximately $4.84 million, making it their 20th largest position. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in FedEx, which has shown strong stock performance with a recent quarterly earnings beat and a declared quarterly dividend of $1.45. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for FDX with an average price target of $281.79.

feed.title: Wall Street Bullish on Uber Technologies (UBER), Here's Why
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are bullish on Uber Technologies (UBER) following its recent expansions of robotaxi services in Dallas and Abu Dhabi. Brian Nowak from Morgan Stanley and Mark Mahaney from Evercore ISI both reiterated Buy ratings, with price targets of $110 and $150 respectively. The company's global technology platform connects consumers with transportation, delivery, and logistics services.

feed.title: Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) Opower to deliver AI energy insights to Xcel’s 3.9 million electric customers
feed.summary: Xcel Energy has chosen Oracle's AI-enabled Opower platform to provide personalized energy usage insights, savings tips, and program recommendations to its 3.9 million electric and 2.2 million natural gas customers. This initiative aims to enhance customer experience, support grid resiliency, and help customers manage their energy consumption and costs. The platform will deliver comparative home usage reports, behavioral demand-response messages for peak reduction, and AI-driven real-time analytics for program performance.

feed.title: OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC Purchases New Shares in United Rentals, Inc. $URI
feed.summary: OCONNOR, a distinct business unit of UBS Asset Management Americas LLC, recently acquired 15,850 shares of United Rentals (NYSE: URI) in the second quarter, valuing this new position at approximately $11.94 million. This acquisition makes United Rentals the 20th largest holding in OCONNOR's investment portfolio, representing about 0.6% of its total assets. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., JPMorgan Chase & Co., Franklin Resources Inc., Norges Bank, and The Manufacturers Life Insurance Company also modified their holdings in United Rentals recently.

feed.title: Marathon Capital Management Purchases New Shares in Builders FirstSource, Inc. $BLDR
feed.summary: Marathon Capital Management has acquired a new position in Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE:BLDR) by purchasing 57,727 shares valued at approximately $6.74 million, making it their 16th largest holding. Other institutional investors like State Street Corp, Wellington Management Group LLP, and Dimensional Fund Advisors LP have also adjusted their stakes in BLDR. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating for the stock with a price target of $136.86.

feed.title: Stryker declares an $0.88 per share quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share, payable on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on December 31, 2025. This dividend represents a 4.8% increase compared to the prior year and previous quarter, reflecting the company's confidence in its financial performance and capital allocation strategy.

feed.title: Stryker (NYSE: SYK) boosts dividend 4.8% to $0.88, payable Jan. 30, 2026 to shareholders of
feed.summary: Stryker (NYSE: SYK) has announced a 4.8% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $0.88 per share. This dividend is payable on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. The company stated this increase is consistent with its capital allocation priorities and reflects confidence in its future financial performance.

feed.title: OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC Has $19.59 Million Stock Position in Occidental Petroleum Corporation $OXY
feed.summary: OCONNOR, a business unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC, increased its stake in Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) by 23.9% in the second quarter, now owning 466,400 shares valued at $19.59 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in OXY. The oil and gas producer recently reported Q3 earnings exceeding estimates and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Thoughtworks Recognized as a Visionary in 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Custom Software Development Services
feed.summary: Thoughtworks, a global technology consultancy, has been recognized as a Visionary in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Custom Software Development Services. The company is noted for its ability to craft resilient, scalable software by integrating design, engineering, and AI, serving over 300 clients globally. Thoughtworks emphasizes continuous experimentation and high-value partnerships, focusing on helping clients navigate the AI landscape with technologically advanced and purpose-built platforms.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. $IR Shares Bought by OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC
feed.summary: OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC significantly increased its stake in Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) by 674% in Q2, bringing its total holdings to 116,100 shares valued at $9.66 million. Ingersoll Rand recently reported Q3 EPS of $0.86, missing estimates slightly, while revenue beat expectations at $1.96 billion. The stock, currently trading around $80.98, has a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $94.20.

feed.title: FIS (NYSE: FIS) designated a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for North America retail core banking
feed.summary: FIS has been recognized as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Retail Core Banking Systems, North America, highlighting the strength of its HORIZON and Integrated Banking Solution (IBS) offerings. This achievement validates FIS' commitment to helping financial institutions modernize their banking infrastructure. The company's modernization framework supports tailored transformation paths, integrating advanced capabilities like cloud-native architectures, API-first design, and AI.

feed.title: Marathon Capital Management Buys 5,524 Shares of Danaher Corporation $DHR
feed.summary: Marathon Capital Management increased its stake in Danaher Corporation by 30.8% during the 2nd quarter, acquiring an additional 5,524 shares and bringing its total holdings to 23,449 shares valued at $4,632,000. Other institutional investors, including Norges Bank and Generation Investment Management LLP, also significantly modified their positions in DHR. Insider transactions show recent sales of Danaher stock by SVP Georgeann Couchara and SVP Brian W. Ellis, totaling over $6.6 million in the last three months.

feed.title: Charles River (NYSE: CRL) names 6 firms to cell & gene therapy incubator, opens 2026 apps
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) has announced the second cohort of its Cell & Gene Therapy Incubator Program (CIP), selecting six companies focused on advanced therapy development and enabling technologies. The program aims to accelerate the development of life-changing therapies by providing scientific and commercial expertise, regulatory guidance, and access to Charles River's global network and manufacturing capabilities. Applications for the 2026 cohort are now open, continuing Charles River's commitment to supporting early-stage biotechnology innovators.

feed.title: 524,615 Shares in CenterPoint Energy, Inc. $CNP Bought by OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC
feed.summary: OCONNOR A Distinct Business Unit of UBS ASSET MANAGEMENT AMERICAS LLC has acquired 524,615 shares of CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE:CNP), a new stake valued at approximately $19.27 million. This investment positions CenterPoint Energy as the 14th largest holding in OCONNOR's portfolio, representing about 1.0% of its total assets. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in the utilities provider, which currently has a consensus "Hold" rating from Wall Street analysts with a target price of $41.50.

feed.title: Nebula Research & Development LLC Invests $3.65 Million in Intuit Inc. $INTU
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC has acquired a new stake of 4,633 shares in Intuit Inc., valued at approximately $3.65 million. This investment comes as Intuit reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $3.34 EPS and 18.3% year-over-year revenue growth. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of Intuit's stock, while insider selling has also been noted.

feed.title: DXCM Investors Have Opportunity to Lead DexCom, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against DexCom, Inc. for alleged violations of securities laws, urging investors who purchased shares between January 8, 2024, and July 25, 2024, to come forward. The lawsuit claims DexCom made false and misleading statements about its growth and margins, which were overly optimistic given its struggles with existing distribution channels. Investors have until October 21, 2024, to contact the firm to participate and potentially recover damages.

feed.title: Moderna Secures $1.5B Five-Year Loan from Ares Management Ahead of Strategy Update
feed.summary: Moderna has secured a $1.5 billion five-year loan from Ares Management Corp to provide flexibility for business development and risk management. This financing comes as Moderna targets up to 10% revenue growth in 2026, aiming to recover from significant revenue declines since the COVID-19 vaccine demand collapsed. The company anticipates future growth from new partnerships, its next-generation COVID vaccine, and upcoming COVID-flu combination and norovirus shots.

feed.title: L3Harris reaches full-scale production of missile-tracking satellites for SDA
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has achieved full-scale production of advanced missile-tracking satellites for the Space Development Agency (SDA), crucial for U.S. and allied defense. The company is integrating Tranche 1 units and has completed Tranche 2 subsystems at its expanded Florida facility. These satellites will provide near-global missile warning, tracking, and defense as part of the SDA's Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture.

feed.title: Major Investors Reshape Their Stakes in Globe Life
feed.summary: Major institutional investors have significantly reshuffled their positions in Globe Life Inc., with some aggressively increasing their stakes while others pared down holdings. This activity coincides with Globe Life's robust financial health, including strong third-quarter results, an increased dividend, and expanded share repurchase program. Analysts largely maintain a positive outlook, reinforcing a "Buy" to "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Altria CEO Billy Gifford to retire in May, CFO Mancuso to succeed
feed.summary: Altria CEO Billy Gifford will retire in May 2026 after leading the tobacco giant since 2020. Current CFO Salvatore Mancuso is set to succeed him, with Heather Newman taking over as CFO. Gifford will remain as a consultant through at least the end of 2026 as Altria navigates regulatory scrutiny and declining cigarette sales while trying to expand its portfolio of smoking alternatives.

feed.title: Chevron (CVX) Analyst Rating: B of A Securities Lowers Price Tar
feed.summary: B of A Securities has maintained its 'Buy' rating on Chevron (CVX) but lowered its price target from $183.00 to $180.00. This adjustment, made by analyst Jean Ann Salisbury, represents a 1.64% decrease, reflecting a slightly more moderate short-term valuation view despite the positive rating. The article also provides a summary of other recent analyst ratings and Chevron's company profile.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: This SEC filing details a new offering from JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC: "Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes Linked to the Class A Common Stock of Meta Platforms, Inc. due January 22, 2027," fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes offer contingent interest payments if Meta's stock price meets certain thresholds and can be automatically called early. Investors face risks including potential loss of principal and dependence on Meta's stock performance and the creditworthiness of JPMorgan entities.

feed.title: Incyte stock hits 52-week high at 108.81 USD
feed.summary: Incyte Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week high of $108.81, reflecting a 35.01% appreciation over the past year and underscoring strong investor confidence. This performance is bolstered by strategic moves, including an exclusive option to acquire Prelude Therapeutics’ JAK2V617F JH2 inhibitor program, and positive analyst ratings from TD Cowen, Oppenheimer, and Guggenheim. The company's robust Q3 revenues surpassed estimates, further contributing to its strong market position.

feed.title: Nebula Research & Development LLC Has $2.81 Million Position in Devon Energy Corporation $DVN
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC significantly increased its stake in Devon Energy Corporation ($DVN) during Q2, purchasing 49,111 additional shares to bring its total holding to 88,226 shares valued at approximately $2.81 million. Devon Energy reported strong Q2 earnings of $1.04 EPS, exceeding analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $44.55.

feed.title: Nebula Research & Development LLC Has $3.51 Million Stock Position in Old Republic International Corporation $ORI
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC significantly increased its stake in Old Republic International (ORI) by 62.6% to 91,375 shares, valued at approximately $3.51 million. This highlights a broader institutional interest, with 70.92% of the company owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. Analysts widely recommend ORI with an average "Strong Buy" rating and a target price of $49, driven by strong recent financial performance, including an EPS beat and a consistent dividend payout.

feed.title: Nebula Research & Development LLC Invests $3.01 Million in Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC recently purchased a new stake of 9,198 shares in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) valued at approximately $3.01 million during the second quarter. Cummins reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates, and trading near its one-year high, currently offering an annualized dividend yield of 1.5%.

feed.title: 13,829 Shares in STERIS plc $STE Acquired by Nebula Research & Development LLC
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC recently acquired 13,829 shares of STERIS plc (STE) valued at approximately $3.32 million, contributing to institutional ownership of 94.69%. The company maintains an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $273.50.

feed.title: Nebula Research & Development LLC Has $2.88 Million Stock Position in General Motors Company $GM
feed.summary: Nebula Research & Development LLC reduced its stake in General Motors Company by 27.5%, now holding shares valued at $2.88 million. feed.title: Loews (NYSE: L) faces breach finding in Delaware Supreme Court Boardwalk case
feed.summary: The Delaware Supreme Court found Loews Corporation breached a partnership agreement related to its 2018 acquisition of Boardwalk Pipelines' minority interests. While other claims were resolved in Loews' favor, the question of tortious interference liability has been returned to the Court of Chancery. This ruling potentially reopens exposure to an earlier $690 million award plus interest, extending litigation that began over seven years ago.

feed.title: TFC Downgraded to Neutral by Baird: Analyst Rating Update | TFC Stock News
feed.summary: Baird has downgraded Truist Financial (TFC) from Outperform to Neutral, while maintaining a price target of $52.00. This shift in rating reflects a reevaluation of TFC's market performance, following several recent analyst adjustments. The article highlights other recent analyst ratings and provides an overview of TFC, its financial forecasts, and GuruFocus estimates.

feed.title: Netflix Stock Rises. It Shrugs off Another Price Target Cut Amid Warner Bros. Battle.
feed.summary: Netflix stock saw a premarket rise on Thursday, poised to break a six-day losing streak despite an analyst cutting its price target. Investors have been concerned about the streamer's recent deal to acquire Warner Bros., which had contributed to the prior slump.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants (DRI): Analyst Lowers Price Target to $205
feed.summary: Stephens & Co. analyst Jim Salera has lowered the price target for Darden Restaurants (DRI) from $215 to $205, maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment reflects ongoing analyst evaluations of the company's market position, following similar price target reductions by other firms. Despite these adjustments, the average analyst target price of $219.94 suggests a potential upside of 22.79% from the current price.

feed.title: QQQ ETF Daily Snapshot, 12/11/2025
feed.summary: The Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ) saw a 0.41% increase on Wednesday due to a Federal Reserve interest-rate cut, but was down 0.60% in Thursday's pre-market trading, influenced by Oracle's disappointing Q2 FY26 revenue and increased spending. Despite this, QQQ has risen 1.18% over the past five days and 22.7% year-to-date, with a Moderate Buy consensus from analysts and an implied upside potential of 16.3%.

feed.title: Scotiabank Sticks to Their Buy Rating for AbbVie (ABBV)
feed.summary: Scotiabank analyst Louise Chen has reiterated a Buy rating for AbbVie (ABBV) with a price target of $280.00. This follows AbbVie's recent Q3 earnings report, which showed $15.78 billion in revenue. Other analysts have offered mixed ratings, with HSBC issuing a Buy and TR | OpenAI – 4o maintaining a Hold.
